name: Detected an Unquoted Service Binary Path with Spaces
bb_references: BB: Service Binary Path Has Been Set or Updated
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

when an event matches any of the following BB: Service Binary Path Has Been Set or Updated
when the event matches Target Details (custom) does not contain any of ", Target Details (custom) matches any of expressions .*\s.*\.exe
